name: rendera
description: Open source video editor - Recorder + Editor

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:projects" "npm run dev:recorder" "npm run dev:editor" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w main && npm run build -w @rendera/projects && npm run build -w @rendera/recorder && npm run build -w @rendera/editor
